description_long: This motorcycle features a sporty, naked street design with a blue and white color scheme accented by black components. The frame is exposed, revealing a robust engine and mechanical details, while the fuel tank is sculpted and painted with a dynamic blue and white pattern. The seat is contoured for both rider and passenger, with a rear grab rail and a prominent exhaust pipe on the right side. The front end includes a single headlight, side mirrors, and a small windscreen, while the wheels are alloy with disc brakes. The rear section is equipped with a license plate holder, taillight, and turn signals, and the overall build suggests a modern, urban commuter or sport motorcycle. The materials appear to be primarily metal and plastic, with rubber tires and some glass elements in the lights and mirrors.
description: A modern, blue and white naked street motorcycle with exposed frame, alloy wheels, and a contoured seat. Features include a single headlight, rear grab rail, and prominent exhaust.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single headlight, front fender, handlebars, and mirrors.
description_view_1: Left-side perspective highlighting the fuel tank, seat, side stand, and exhaust pipe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillight, license plate holder, rear wheel, and grab rail.
description_view_3: Right-side profile showing the engine, exhaust, alloy wheels, and overall body shape.
